en: I can't believe it, in just a week she'll be off to Smeltings.
Caveat Smeltonia, proudest moment of my life.
Will I have to wear that too?
Don't be so stupid. You're going to go to the state school where you belong.
Now this is what you're going to be wearing when I've finished dyeing it.
But that's Dudley's old uniform. It'll fit me like bits of old elephant skin.
Go and get the post. Go!
